null_result_policy: publish null, negative, blocked, and failed hypotheses at full weight
scientific_question: Does external verification materially reduce false completion acceptance in autonomous software-agent work while preserving legitimate completion?
self_validation_risk_control: Telos must be compared against simpler baselines on identical artifacts. A future positive result is valid only if Telos rejects false completions not rejected by simpler methods without materially increasing false rejection of legitimate work.
